# Cue llms-full.txt

This file is the expanded agent-facing context for the public Cue repository.

## Project Identity

- Product: Cue
- Category: image-first desktop design workstation
- Current public support bar: source release plus verified macOS DMG build
- Desktop shell: Tauri
- Native runtime: Rust engine packaged as the legacy internal resource `brood-rs`
- Public configuration: prefer `CUE_*`; `BROOD_*` remains a documented compatibility alias layer

## Read First

- [`README.md`](README.md)
- [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md)
- [`docs/README.md`](docs/README.md)
- [`docs/agent_quickstart.md`](docs/agent_quickstart.md)
- [`docs/agent-runtime.md`](docs/agent-runtime.md)
- [`docs/agent-affordances.json`](docs/agent-affordances.json)
- [`docs/legacy-internals.md`](docs/legacy-internals.md)

## Intake And Fallback

- Preferred intake contract: [`agent-intake.json`](agent-intake.json)
- Schema: [`docs/aip-1.schema.json`](docs/aip-1.schema.json)
- Intake health rules: [`docs/agent_intake_status.md`](docs/agent_intake_status.md)
- Roundtrip example: [`docs/agent_intake_roundtrip.sample.json`](docs/agent_intake_roundtrip.sample.json)
- If intake is unavailable, use [`llms.txt`](llms.txt) and the fallback entrypoints in [`agent-intake.json`](agent-intake.json).

## Public Documentation Surface

- [`docs/desktop.md`](docs/desktop.md): desktop behavior, run directories, shell/runtime layout
- [`docs/agent-runtime.md`](docs/agent-runtime.md): current shipped Agent Run and observable-driver contract
- [`docs/agent-workflow-prd.md`](docs/agent-workflow-prd.md): implemented workflow scope vs future direction
- [`docs/agent-affordances.json`](docs/agent-affordances.json): machine-readable runtime summary
- [`docs/local-magic-select-runtime.md`](docs/local-magic-select-runtime.md): prepared local Magic Select contract
- [`docs/macos-local-private-image-editing.md`](docs/macos-local-private-image-editing.md): macOS local/private workflow notes
- [`docs/benchmark-playbook.md`](docs/benchmark-playbook.md): reproducible benchmark format
- [`RELEASING.md`](RELEASING.md): maintainer release workflow

## Current Agent Surfaces

- Goal contract compiler: [`desktop/src/agent_runner_goal_contract.js`](desktop/src/agent_runner_goal_contract.js)
- Agent Run planner: [`desktop/src/agent_runner_runtime.js`](desktop/src/agent_runner_runtime.js)
- Observable driver: [`desktop/src/agent_observable_driver.js`](desktop/src/agent_observable_driver.js)
- Single-image routing: [`desktop/src/single_image_capability_routing.js`](desktop/src/single_image_capability_routing.js)
- Tool runtime: [`desktop/src/tool_runtime.js`](desktop/src/tool_runtime.js)
- Design Review schemas and planner/apply models: [`desktop/src/design_review_contract.js`](desktop/src/design_review_contract.js)

## High-Signal Source Entrypoints

- [`desktop/src/agent_runner_runtime.js`](desktop/src/agent_runner_runtime.js)
- [`desktop/src/agent_runner_goal_contract.js`](desktop/src/agent_runner_goal_contract.js)
- [`desktop/src/agent_observable_driver.js`](desktop/src/agent_observable_driver.js)
- [`desktop/src/single_image_capability_routing.js`](desktop/src/single_image_capability_routing.js)
- [`desktop/src/tool_runtime.js`](desktop/src/tool_runtime.js)
- [`desktop/src/juggernaut_shell/rail.js`](desktop/src/juggernaut_shell/rail.js)
- [`desktop/src/design_review_contract.js`](desktop/src/design_review_contract.js)
- [`desktop/src/canvas_app.js`](desktop/src/canvas_app.js)
- [`desktop/src/index.html`](desktop/src/index.html)
- [`desktop/src/styles.css`](desktop/src/styles.css)
- [`desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs`](desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs)
- [`desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`](desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json)
- [`desktop/src/magic_select_runtime.js`](desktop/src/magic_select_runtime.js)
- [`rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs)
- [`rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs)
- [`rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs)

## Validation Commands

- `./scripts/check_agent_entrypoints.py`
- `cd desktop && npm test`
- `cd desktop && npm run build`
- `cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo check`
- `cd rust_engine && cargo check`
- `./scripts/release_check.sh`

## Release Notes

- The public release flow is macOS-first. Windows and Linux remain roadmap targets and should be described honestly.
- The release rehearsal should produce `desktop/src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/Cue_<version>_aarch64.dmg`.
- Public release names and GitHub Releases should say Cue.
- Homebrew is intentionally out of scope for the first open-source launch.

## Guardrails

- Keep user-facing naming on Cue.
- Do not reintroduce machine-local absolute paths.
- Do not commit secrets.
- Do not document aspirational agent APIs as if they are shipped contracts.
- Treat [`docs/legacy-internals.md`](docs/legacy-internals.md) as the allowlist for temporary old internal names that still exist for launch-risk reasons.
